name: Goong-Hom-pha: Prawn Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the fish or soy sauce with coriander, garlic, and peppercorn.
2. Marinate the shelled prawns in the mixture for five minutes.
3. Use the crepes or pancakes to wrap the marinated prawns individually.
4. Tie noodles around each roll.
5. If the soybean crepes are hard when purchased, sprinkle some water on them to make them more manageable and prevent breaking easily.
6. Deep-fry the rolls in hot cooking oil until golden brown (medium heat).
7. Serve with sauces: plain soy sauce, hot pepper sauce, plum sauce, or Sriracha chili sauce.
